oatmeal-carrot-raisin-cookies.name: Oatmeal Carrot Raisin Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Whisk peanut butter, coconut oil, agave nectar, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla together in a bowl. Whisk flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, and cloves together in a separate bowl; stir into peanut butter mixture until dough comes together. Fold oats, carrots, and raisins into dough. Spoon dough, 1 to 2 tablespoons per cookie, onto a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are lightly browned, about 15 minutes.

oaxaca-old-fashioned-cocktail.name: Oaxaca Old Fashioned Cocktail

ingredients.prep: Del Maguey San Luis del Rio preferred

instructions: Mix the tequila, mezcal, agave nectar, and bitters in a mixing glass with ice.
Strain over a fresh rock in an Old Fashioned glass.
Flame an orange peel over the top of the drink, and rest the twist in the glass as a garnish.

omas-rhubarb-cake.name: Oma's Rhubarb Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking dish.
To make the cake: Stir together flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
Stir in eggs and sour cream until smooth, then fold in rhubarb.
Pour into the prepared dish and spread evenly.
To make the streusel: Stir together sugar and butter in a medium bowl until smooth. Stir in flour until mixture is crumbly.
Sprinkle mixture on top of cake, then dust lightly with cinnamon.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 45 minutes.
Serve and enjoy!

omelette-with-spinach-argiro.name: Omelette With Spinach
instructions: Wash the spinach and chop it.
Cut into pieces the avocado, ham and parsley.
Place the eggs in a bowl and whisk them together.
In medium non-stick pan and medium heat, heat the butter with the oil to melt.
Add the beaten eggs and allow for about 1 minute over medium heat to stabilise underneath.
Touch the tortilla on the liquid eggs, dip it on the liquid surface of the eggs on both sides and dress around with an egg.
We cover half-baked eggs with the tortilla.
Bake for 30 seconds and turn the other side over to the pan.
Sprinkle the cheeses on the surface, add the spinach, ham, tomato slices and avocado slices.
We lift with a spatula and fold in half like a half moon.

one-pan-sweet-potato-breakfast-hash.name: One-pan Sweet Potato Breakfast Hash
instructions: Dice the sweet potato
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the diced sweet potato, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes, or until it begins to soften.
While the sweet potato cooks, dice the red onion and mince the garlic. Add to the skillet.
Dice and seed the bell peppers and add to the skillet.
Dice the jalapeño, if using, and add.
Chop the green onion and rosemary, if using fresh, and add to skillet. Cover and cook for about 5 minutes, or until the sweet potato is tender.

Create 4 wells in the vegetable mixture, not too close to the edges of the skillet, but far enough apart that they aren't touching. Crack 1 egg into each well. Cover and cook for 3-5 minutes more, or the eggs are cooked to your liking.
Breakfast is served!
Enjoy!

orange-almond-brownie-lezzet.name: Orange Almond Brownie
instructions: 1. Set oven to 170 degrees.
2. 20 cm x 20 cm in a caliper oil paper cool.
3. Leave the almonds to roast and cool in the pan with nonstick surface.
4. Spray the grated shell with butter, sugar and orange juice thoroughly with mixer.
5. Add single egg yolks and keep whipping.
6. Add the chocolate to the mixture of bananas.
7.  Un ve toz bademi ilave edin.
8. Cook eggs in a dry and clean container until 1 pinch is joined with salt.
9. Add to the mixture of chocolate and gently mix it with spatulas.
10. Add the almonds and transfer dough caliba and cook for 30-40 minutes.
11. 11. Leave the cream and honey into the sauce pan for over.
12. Add the chocolate and mix it until it is melted.
12. August Add the butter and continue mixing.
14 July Leave it from January and cool.
15. pour and serve on the cake.

orange-balsamic-glazed-salmon.name: Orange Balsamic Glazed Salmon

ingredients.prep: stalks and core removed, thinly sliced

instructions: Combine 1/4 cup Marie's Balsamic Vinaigrette, pepper, honey, and orange liqueur to make glaze. Zest orange and add to the glaze.
Slice peel off orange, removing all of white pith. Slice oranges into rounds, then into quarters. Reserve.
Preheat the oven's broiler. Cover a broiler pan with nonstick foil. Sprinkle salmon with salt. Broil salmon, brushing often with glaze until cooked, about 8 minutes. Do not turn.
Toss spring mix with asparagus, fennel, and remaining 1/2 cup Marie's Balsamic Vinaigrette. Divide among 4 plates and top with salmon. Garnish salads with orange pieces and Parmesan.

orange-muffins-teleculinaria.name: Orange Muffins
instructions: Separate the egg yolks from the whites. In a glass, beat the clears in castle and reserve.
In another cup, beat the yolks with sugar, until you get a cute cream. Add the flour, yeast, oil and orange juice and continue to beat. Then carefully add the clear ones and wrap them well.
Garnish forms of muffins with butter and sprinkle with flour and bring them to the oven, preheated to 180oC, for 15 minutes or until cooked. Remove from the oven, deform and let it cool.
Prepare a calda: fatie finamente as cascas da laranja. Leve um tacho ao lume com os ingredientes da calda e deixe ferver durante 5 minutos. Regue com a calda e sirva.

orange-pie-argiro.name: Orange Pie
instructions: All materials must be at room temperature.
First we make the syrup so it cools until it's cooked.
Place the sugar, water and cinnamon in a pot and boil for 4 minutes.
Since it's boiling, we don't mix.
After boiling, add the juice, zest and jam, mix and let it cool completely.

our-backyard-grilled-garlic-butter-shrim.name: Our Backyard Grilled Garlic-butter Shrimp
instructions: Place parsley and olive oil into a resealable plastic bag. Add shrimp, coat with the marinade, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours. Soak skewers in water during the last 30 minutes or so.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Remove shrimp from the marinade and thread onto skewers. Season generously with seasoned salt. Place parsley and remaining marinade in a grill-safe pan with butter and garlic.

Grill skewers until shrimp are pink and firm, about 3 minutes per side. In the meantime, place the grill pan on the grate; melt and simmer the butter-parsley mixture until butter is just golden-brown, 4 to 5 minutes.
Remove shrimp from skewers and drop into the butter-parsley mixture. Toss to coat. Serve immediately.

oven-baked-keto-chicken-thighs-with-crea.name: Oven-baked Keto Chicken Thighs With Creamed Spinach And Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Garlic and herb cheese spread (such as boursin®)

instructions: Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and crumble once cool enough to handle. Reserve bacon drippings.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Pat chicken thighs dry and season with salt and pepper.

Heat reserved bacon drippings in a large skillet over medium heat and cook onions and mushrooms, stirring occasionally, until mushrooms are soft and onions are translucent, 7 to 8 minutes. Place vegetables into a large mixing bowl and mix in well-dried spinach. Set aside.

Wipe the skillet clean. Add ghee and melt over medium heat. Once skillet is hot, add chicken thighs and lightly brown on each side, 3 to 4 minutes per side; the chicken will still be pink in the middle. Remove chicken from skillet and set aside.

Combine chicken broth, cream, softened garlic and herb cheese spread , and 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese in a small bowl; whisk until well combined. Pour broth mixture over vegetable mixture in the mixing bowl and mix to combine. Season with salt and pepper. Add vegetable mixture to skillet and place browned chicken thighs on top. Top with crumbled bacon, sliced almonds, ground pork rinds, and remaining 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese.

Bake in the preheated oven until chicken thighs are no longer pink at the bone, juices run clear, and spinach mixture is bubbly, about 30 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone should read 74°C (74 degrees C). Remove from the oven and allow to rest about 10 minutes before serving.

overnight-oats.name: Overnight Oats

ingredients.prep: almond milk, soy milk, oat milk, or coconut milk), plus more

instructions: Combine oats, yogurt, flaxseeds (if using), wheat bran (if using), salt, and 1¼ cups nut milk in a medium bowl, re-sealable plastic quart container, mason jar, or large measuring cup. If serving with a sweet topping, add agave syrup and stir to combine. Cover and chill overnight.

If desired, loosen mixture by stirring in a few more tablespoons of nut milk and let come to room temperature. Top as desired.
Do Ahead: Oats can be assembled 4 days ahead. Keep chilled.
